ResearchProjectDef.label: Frontier Weapon Manufacturing
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct advanced weaponry used by Dominion settlers. Note that these also require advanced components.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Mercenary Armaments Weaponry
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct advanced weaponry favored by Dominion pirates and Mercenaries. Note that these also require advanced components.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Advanced Polymer Weaponry
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct advanced weaponry fielded by Dominion armed forces. Note that these also require advanced components.

ResearchProjectDef.label: High-Frequency Vibration Generators
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct weapons that use ultrasonic vibration generators. Note that these also require advanced components.
